Affiliate Disclosure

Last updated: July 6, 2026

In short: Some links on AI Tools Hub are affiliate links. If you click an affiliate link and make a purchase, we may earn a commission at no additional cost to you. This helps us keep the site running and continue providing free, honest reviews.

What Are Affiliate Links?

Affiliate links are special URLs that track referrals from our site to product websites. When you click one of these links and make a purchase (or sign up for a service), the product company may pay us a small commission.

How This Affects You

Nothing changes for you. The price you pay is the same whether you use our affiliate link or go directly to the product's website. In some cases, our links may even offer you exclusive discounts.

How This Affects Our Content

It doesn't — or at least, it shouldn't, and we work hard to ensure that. Our editorial process is completely separate from our affiliate partnerships:

  • We never accept payment for positive reviews.
  • We never allow companies to preview or approve our reviews before publication.
  • We clearly mark all affiliate links on the page.
  • We test every product ourselves before recommending it.
  • We include honest pros and cons for every product, regardless of affiliate status.

Which Links Are Affiliate Links?

On review and comparison pages, any "Try [Product]" or "Visit [Product]" button that links externally is likely an affiliate link. We clearly label these sections with a note explaining the affiliate relationship. On pages without affiliate partnerships, all links are regular, non-tracked links.

Our Commitment

We started AI Tools Hub because we were frustrated by unreliable, SEO-churned review sites. Our goal is to be the resource we wished existed — honest, thorough, and developer-focused. Affiliate revenue helps us sustain this work, but it never dictates what we write.

Questions?

If you have any questions about our affiliate practices, please contact us at hello@aitools.dev.

Affiliate Disclosure: AI Tools Hub is supported by our readers. Some links on this site are affiliate links, meaning we may earn a commission if you make a purchase through them — at no extra cost to you.
